title: agentify-config
description: Configuration schema for the agentify Claude Code plugin. Drives the parameter substitutions performed at agentification time (placeholders of the form {__AGT_FIELD__} in AGENTIFY.md, hooks, prompts, and templates) and the runtime behavior of the plugin's slash commands. Resolved by lib/resolve_config.sh in the precedence order: skill args > project-root agentify.config.json > plugin-install agentify.config.default.json.

company.description: Identity of the team or organization the harness is being agentified for. Used in soft-framing prose (AGENTS.md, REVIEW/REVISE prompts) and in any branding-bearing template output.

skills.description: Skill (slash command) namespace conventions. The prefix is the per-target shorthand for distinguishing the agentified skills from upstream Claude Code natives.

prefix.description: Lowercase 2-6 character prefix (e.g., 'agt', 'ac', 'eg'). Substituted into {__AGT_SKILL_PREFIX__}; produces slash commands like /<prefix>-loop, /<prefix>-config.

plugin.description: Plugin packaging metadata. Drives marketplace.json and plugin.json fields.

name.description: Plugin name as registered in the marketplace. Substituted into {__AGT_PLUGIN_NAME__}.

namespace.description: Plugin namespace (e.g., 'agentify-marketplace:agentify' yields slash commands like /agentify:agt-loop). Substituted into {__AGT_PLUGIN_NAMESPACE__}.

marketplace.description: Where the plugin is published and (optionally) which Git host pattern is allowed for managed-settings hostPattern guards.

url.description: Marketplace install URL passed to `claude /plugin marketplace add`. Substituted into {__AGT_MARKETPLACE_URL__}. Examples: 'github:moukrea/agentify-marketplace', 'https://github.com/moukrea/agentify-marketplace', 'https://gitlab.example.com/team/agentify-marketplace'.

name.description: Local-alias name for the marketplace, used after `marketplace add` (e.g., 'agentify-marketplace'). Substituted into {__AGT_MARKETPLACE_NAME__}.

host_pattern.description: Optional regex used by managed-settings.json's hostPattern guard. Restricts the plugin to only activate on repos whose remote URL matches. Substituted into {__AGT_MARKETPLACE_HOST__}. Example: '^https://github\.com/' or '^https://gitlab\.acme\.local/'.

host_pattern_regex.description: JSON-escaped variant of `host_pattern` for embedding inside JSON-quoted strings (e.g., the managed-settings.json hostPattern field where `.` must be `\\.`). Substituted into {__AGT_MARKETPLACE_HOST_REGEX__}. resolve_config.sh derives this from `host_pattern` automatically when not set explicitly.

ticket_system.description: Ticket-tracker conventions for example references in AGENTIFY.md (e.g., 'see PROJ-9876 for the regression'). Optional; substituted only into example/illustrative text, never into operational code paths.

prefix.description: Ticket-ID prefix for the company's tracker (e.g., 'JIRA-', 'PROJ-', 'TASK-'). Substituted into {__AGT_TICKET_PREFIX__}.

feedback.description: Feedback channel configuration. Drives /agt-feedback (WS-G-002) destination and /agt-self-improve (WS-F) ingestion source via lib/feedback_ingest.sh (WS-G-004).

upstream_repo.description: GitHub <owner>/<name> where /agt-feedback files issues. Defaults at runtime to the owner/name parsed from marketplace.url when not set explicitly. Example: 'moukrea/agentify-marketplace'.

anonymize_company.description: If true, /agt-feedback substitutes 'private' for company.name in the issue body's Target repo profile section. Engineers can still override per-submission.

fleet.description: Fleet-context soft-framing for REVIEW/REVISE prompt templates. Optional; omitted if size is unknown.

size_engineers.description: Headcount of the engineering team this harness is sized for. Substituted into {__AGT_FLEET_SIZE__}; if null, the prompt template falls back to 'the fleet'.

loop.description: Loop-runtime configuration: where the harness writes its state, revisions, reviews, session summary.

path_root.description: Directory (relative to repo root) where loop state is written. Substituted into {__AGT_LOOP_PATH_ROOT__}; flows into LOOP_PROMPT.md's state_root parameter, hooks' ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/<path_root>/* paths, and the AGENTS.md template.
